message:
fix(command): arity checks, MEMORY error format, SAMPLES 0 rejection

- BLMPOP: minimum arity 5 (was 4), matching Redis COMMAND table arity -5
- BZMPOP: minimum arity 5 (was 4), matching Redis COMMAND table arity -5
- MEMORY unknown subcommand: return proper "Unknown subcommand" error
  format instead of generic SyntaxError (matches all other subcommand
  dispatchers in the codebase)
- MEMORY USAGE SAMPLES: reject 0 (must be positive, was only rejecting
  negative)
- Updated conformance fixtures for new MEMORY error format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
